arts.ttl: Liverpool FC staff party halted over drug fears
arts.sum: Liverpool FC said it does "not tolerate the use of illegal substances" at any of its events or venues.

arts.ttl: Premier League issue two Andy Robertson statements after Liverpool star sent off
arts.sum: Liverpool defender Andy Robertson was in the thick of the action in his side's clash with Fulham, as the Scot was sent off just 17 minutes into the match for bringing down Harry Wilson

arts.ttl: Andreas Pereira controversially opens the scoring for Fulham against Liverpool - just moments after he avoided being sent off for a foul on Ryan Gravenberch that Mike Dean claimed was '100 per cent a red card'
arts.sum: Andreas Pereira opened the scoring for Fulham against Liverpool, just moments after many felt he should have been sent off for a foul on Ryan Gravenberch.

arts.ttl: Money talks! Liverpool star 'demanding £70k-a-week pay rise' in new contract
arts.sum: Luis Diaz has reportedly presented Liverpool with a significant wage demand, which is more than double his current weekly earnings at Anfield.
